diagrams.title: IT Procurement Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the five phases of IT procurement from requirements to disposal in a circular flow
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete procurement process flow and iterative nature of IT procurement

diagrams.title: Make vs Buy Decision Matrix
diagrams.description: Comparison framework for deciding between in-house development and external procurement
diagrams.purpose: Systematically evaluate options when facing build vs purchase decisions

diagrams.title: TCO Iceberg Model
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing visible costs vs hidden lifecycle costs of IT assets
diagrams.purpose: Understand that purchase price is only a small fraction of true cost of IT ownership

diagrams.title: Vendor Evaluation Matrix
diagrams.description: Grid-based tool for comparing multiple vendors on weighted criteria
diagrams.purpose: Objective, systematic vendor comparison using weighted scoring methodology
